message:
fix(backend): dashboard limits, cluster group persistence, validation, parallel queries (#7005-#7013) (#7026)

* fix(backend): onboarding validation, dashboard limits, card type check, role guard

- #7005: SaveResponses now caps responses at 50, validates QuestionKey/Answer lengths
- #7009: ImportDashboard validates card types against registry before persisting
- #7010: CreateDashboard enforces MaxDashboardsPerUser (50) via CountUserDashboards
- #7011: RecordFocus now calls requireEditorOrAdmin before writing

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(backend): cluster group persistence, 207 status, race fix, parallel node fetch

- #7006: UpdateClusterGroup returns 207 on partial label failure
- #7007: DeleteClusterGroup returns 207 on partial label failure
- #7008: SyncClusterGroups captures len(clusterGroups) inside mutex
- #7012: EvaluateClusterQuery fetches nodes in parallel via errgroup
- #7013: Cluster groups persisted to SQLite, reloaded on startup

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -942,6 +942,8 @@ func (s *Server) setupRoutes() {
 
 	// Workload routes
 	workloadHandlers := handlers.NewWorkloadHandlers(s.k8sClient, s.hub, s.store)
+	// Reload persisted cluster groups on startup (#7013).
+	workloadHandlers.LoadPersistedClusterGroups()
 	api.Get("/workloads", workloadHandlers.ListWorkloads)
 	api.Get("/workloads/capabilities", workloadHandlers.GetClusterCapabilities)
 	api.Get("/workloads/policies", workloadHandlers.ListBindingPolicies)
